message:
feat(gateway): implement File Reservation System

Adds comprehensive file reservation functionality for multi-agent coordination:

- reservation.service.ts: Core reservation service with create, check, release, renew, list operations
- reservations.ts: REST API endpoints for all reservation operations
- Improved globToRegex in reservation-conflicts.ts to correctly match ** patterns
- Full unit test suite with 39 tests covering all acceptance criteria

Key features:
- Glob-based pattern matching with ** zero-directory support
- Exclusive and shared reservation modes
- TTL-based automatic expiration with max 1 hour cap
- Maximum 10 renewals per reservation
- Conflict detection with resolution suggestions
- WebSocket event publishing for real-time updates
- Background cleanup job for expired reservations

Closes: flywheel_gateway-5nm

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -68,15 +68,27 @@ function globToRegex(pattern: string): RegExp {
   const GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER = "\x00GLOBSTAR\x00";
 
   let regex = pattern
-    // First, replace ** with placeholder to protect it
+    // Normalize path separators
+    .replace(/\/+/g, "/")
+    // Remove trailing slash
+    .replace(/\/$/, "")
+    // Handle **/ at the start or middle - matches zero or more directories
+    .replace(/\*\*\//g, GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER + "/")
+    // Handle /** at the end - matches zero or more path segments
+    .replace(/\/\*\*/g, "/" + GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER)
+    // Handle remaining ** (in case it's standalone)
     .replace(/\*\*/g, GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER)
     // Escape regex special chars (except glob chars)
     .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
     // * matches anything except path separator
     .replace(/\*/g, "[^/]*")
     // ? matches single character
     .replace(/\?/g, ".")
-    // Now replace placeholder with .* (matches any path segments)
+    // Now replace placeholder/ with (.*/)? - matches zero or more directories
+    .replace(new RegExp(GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER + "/", "g"), "(.*/)?")
+    // Replace /placeholder with (/.*)? - matches zero or more path segments
+    .replace(new RegExp("/" + GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER, "g"), "(/.*)?")
+    // Replace standalone placeholder with .* - matches anything
     .replace(new RegExp(GLOBSTAR_PLACEHOLDER, "g"), ".*");
 
   return new RegExp(`^${regex}$`);
